name: meeple-shelf
description: Your board game shelf, your friends' shelves, and one combined library for game night.

scripts.sync: fly ssh console -a meeple-shelf -C "node /app/export-snapshot.js" && rm -f /tmp/shelf-snapshot.json && fly ssh sftp get /app/data/shelf-snapshot.json /tmp/shelf-snapshot.json -a meeple-shelf && mv /tmp/shelf-snapshot.json data/shelf-snapshot.json && git add data/shelf-snapshot.json && (git diff --quiet HEAD -- data/shelf-snapshot.json || git commit -m "Update shelf data" -- data/shelf-snapshot.json) && git push
scripts.sync-local: node export-snapshot.js && git add data/shelf-snapshot.json && (git diff --quiet HEAD -- data/shelf-snapshot.json || git commit -m "Update shelf data" -- data/shelf-snapshot.json) && git push
